channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Flytipped furniture, 29th March
item.description:
Dumped furniture and cardboard box

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Stodart Road, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegally parked car, 29th March
item.description:
Illegally parked car on a daily basis for months now. Pedestrians can't walk freely. If you have a pram it is even harder and you need to go on the bike lane or on the street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 18, Wandsworth Road, Vauxhall, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large kitchen electrical item, 29th March
item.description:
I reported this a week ago and I’ve had a reply today saying that it couldn’t be found. The item is still there as of today. If you go to the back of 35/37 Fordwhich Close, it is on the GREEN at the back.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Horsmonden Close, Crofton, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Waste bins. I have reported this problem before but nothing has been done. The waste bins at the Court Lane entrance to Dulwich Park are dirty and broken. They are an health hazard, often overflowing and smell foul. The outside is covered in dog urine. The bins need deep cleansing and repair or better still, replacement. There are two bins outside the Park gates and one inside., 29th March
item.description:
This has been a problem for years. Many people use these bins, putting in dog waste and rubbish. There are many dog walkers every day and lots of dog waste to be disposed of. The bins are too small. Can you please replace them with bigger bins and ask the cleansing team to clean them every week. Could they be sprayed with disinfectant?

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Court Lane, Dulwich Village, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags along wall, 29th March
item.description:
The length of this wall is covered in graffiti

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Windmill Hill, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Cars parking on pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Cars are parking on the pavement, blocking the pavement and preventing a hazard to those who are using the pavements. This is not a one off problem but it repeated numerous times.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Great Cambridge Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 29th March
item.description:
Lots of bags of green waste just left on the side of the road

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gospatrick Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree needs cutting back it is clogging up my gutters with leaves, 29th March
item.description:
Large amounts of leaves in my gutters
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Pine Close, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Domestic food waste split everywhere, 29th March
item.description:
Today’s episode of domestic waste dumping has been left outside the bile shop Velo. Bags have split with food and its packaging over the pavement and littering up to the bus stop

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Westcombe Hill, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:
Sofas beds mattresses
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton

item.title: High number of rubbish bags, 29th March
item.description:
General waste bags dumped
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Winchester Road, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, St George's Drive, Victoria, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Blocking pavement, 29th March
item.description:
Many bikes blocking pavement

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, St George's Drive, Victoria, City of Westminster

item.title: Dumped desk chair, 29th March
item.description:
Please note that this has been moved along the road multiple times so may be in a different position

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 100, Kennington Park Road, Elephant and Castle, Greater London

item.title: Graffiti on Oyster machine at Maze Hill station the Tom Smith Close entrance, 29th March
item.description:
Great if you can clean this off

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tom Smith Close, Greenwich

item.title: Household items dumped, 29th March
item.description:
Household items dumped. On Marmadon Road near to the junction of Balgowan Street. Thank you.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bannockburn Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping domestic furniture, 29th March
item.description:
Continuous fly tipping issue. Entire sofa set dumped been there for roughly a week.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Lansdowne Drive, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 8 black sacks food waste dumped, 29th March
item.description:
Dumped by the phone box and open spilling out onto the pavement. Attracting vermin and blocking access. Thank you

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Brookdene Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road sign damaged in Stewartsby Close, 29th March
item.description:
The sign for Pavement Parking in Stewartsby Close has been knocked over & has damaged the pavement around the base.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pasteur Gardens, Edmonton
Report on FixMyStreet
